Class ImageLoader

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
public class ImageLoader extends Object
Utility class to load and cache card images for the JavaFX client.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ImageLoader()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getCardImage(int assetId)
    Gets a card image from the cache or loads it from disk.
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getPreviewImage(String filename)
    Loads an image from the 'preview' folder in the project root or from resources.
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getTileImage(String filename)
    Gets an image from the tiles folder.
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getTokenFrontImage(String colorName)
    Gets a front token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getTokenImage(String colorName)
    Gets a regular token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
    static javafx.scene.image.Image
    getUIImage(String filename)
    Loads an image from the 'ui' folder in the resources.

  • Method Details

    • getCardImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getCardImage(int assetId)
      Gets a card image from the cache or loads it from disk.
      Parameters:
      assetId - the ID of the card image
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found

    • getUIImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getUIImage(String filename)
      Loads an image from the 'ui' folder in the resources.
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found

    • getTileImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getTileImage(String filename)
      Gets an image from the tiles folder.
      Parameters:
      filename - the file name inside mesos-cards/tiles
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found

    • getTokenFrontImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getTokenFrontImage(String colorName)
      Gets a front token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
      Parameters:
      colorName - player color name, e.g. BLUE or YELLOW
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found

    • getTokenImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getTokenImage(String colorName)
      Gets a regular token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
      Parameters:
      colorName - player color name, e.g. BLUE or YELLOW
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found

    • getPreviewImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image getPreviewImage(String filename)
      Loads an image from the 'preview' folder in the project root or from resources.
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file (e.g., "background.png")
      Returns:
      the Image object, or null if not found
